title: MCDealer
description: Online Shop Informations for the VillagerMarket Plugin
body:
![MCDealer Plugin Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/90a18af8217a3c48efdabd98ceb581fa92734b29.png)

**!!!IMPORTANT!!!**  
**This ist the Plugin Version of the MCDealer Web View for VillagerMarket!**  
**If you want to use the standalone version use this [>LINK<](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/mc-dealer.113706/)**  

![FUNCTION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/91e7b5f2bb3ca3050a8512022eddcdd8aecd405c.png)

This plugin makes it possible to display detailed shop data from the [Villager Market](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/villager-market-the-ultimate-shop-plugin.82965/) plugin on a website. Users can therefore easily access the information provided by the plugin and receive a comprehensive overview of the available shop offers.​ Internal web server is included!

![FRONTEND](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/5a54982e1d19ad508583f4d8cf3c72020fb45c8f.png)
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/1fa922daddd6377fbb5488c109744021958665c9.jpeg)

- Stock Quantities
- Prices of Offers and Demands
- Price per Unit
- Best-Price Tags
- Discounts
- Separate Tables for Buying and Selling
- Enchantments and Effects on Items
- Table of Contents (with scroll links to each shop)
- Locations of the Shops
- Custom Currency Symbol
- Search function: Display shops matching search terms.
- Translations:
  - German
  - English
  - French
  - Italian
  - Spanish
  - Polish
  - Ukrainian
  - Portuguese (Brazilian)
  - Simplified Chinese
- Supports [Josh-More-Foods Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/joshs-more-foods)
- Should work with all custom item plugins that use Minecraft's standard textures and change the name of the items. Support for plugins that use their own IDs are not displayed correctly, but can be added upon request.
- Supports 1.20 - 1.20.4 (Other Versions maybe working)

![WHATYOUNEED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/c42a61ffad4e592e389a06a0a39dbfaac569d316.png)

For this plugin, all you need is a Spigot or PaperMC server. Simply place the plugin into the server's plugins folder, and it's ready for use.​ You can configurate port, currency symbol etc. in the config.yml.
No restart needed if you made changes in the config. Only if you made changes to the port the webserver has to restart.

![COMMANDS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/9544d22f9c1a8389fd8014b3f842e30f2905954e.png)

**mcdealer.use**
Allows general access to the /mcdealer command.

**mcdealer.admin**
Allows to use every command

**/mcdealer hideshop | mcdealer.hideshop**
Hiding the shop in front of you
You will see the change after the next script run
If your shop has just been created, wait a moment. VM must first create the required data

**/mcdealer showshop | mcdealer.showshop**
Show the shop in front of you again
You will see the change after the next script run
If your shop has just been created, wait a moment. VM must first create the required data

**/mcdealer listhidden | mcdealer.list**
Show list of all hidden Shops

**/mcdealer restart | mcdealer.restart**
Restart the webserver

**/mcdealer refresh | mcdealer.refresh**
in case you need to refresh the web files
(failed update or if you deleted them)

**/mcdealer link | mcdealer.link**
get a clickable link to the web server address

![TODO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/d213f662643af09aa4374efaec5fd9410d56249c.png)

- Add more supported plugins and mods (later)
- Darkmode/Lightmode
- Auto Reload Data
- Currently you have to refresh the website to see new shopdata
Direct writing into output file via VM API
Optimize commands (Click Event)

![BUGS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/18f7f98d6df046043dddf061cb097e152c208af3.png)

Currently there are no known bugs

[![DEMO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XDNCPFDR/images/64e4f16fdeb7b2284f13d561613c95809c92e0a8.png)](https://ullrichcraft.de/vmshop/)
